title:

【PENTHOUSE GROOVE 45 so what hoodie】

PENTHOUSE GROOVE.

For every challenger.

The PENTHOUSE GROOVE 45 “SO WHAT” Hoodie.

a special edition with “45” on the pocket—an homage to the RPM of a 7-inch record.
